nasb.text: The proud look of man will be abased And the loftiness of man will be humbled, And the Lord alone will be exalted in that day.

esv.text: The haughty looks of man shall be brought low, and the lofty pride of men shall be humbled, and the Lord alone will be exalted in that day.

cnv.text: 到那日，眼目高傲的人必降卑， 性情驕傲的人也必俯首， 唯獨耶和華被高舉。

ccb.text: 到那日，狂妄的人将被挫败， 骄傲的人将遭贬抑； 唯独耶和华将受尊崇。

csbs.text: 到那日，人眼目的高慢必成卑贱， 人的高傲也必会降卑， 唯独耶和华被高举。
